evals.prompt: A North Star has product and architecture drafts plus new SDLC evidence. Prepare interview questions before final lock approval.
evals.expected_output: Creates a prioritized interview packet with review findings, proposed defaults, options, tradeoffs, affected North Star IDs, evidence references, and answer capture rules without approving the North Star.
assertions: Questions are prioritized as P0, P1, or P2.
Each material question includes a proposed default and tradeoffs.
Evidence references and affected North Star IDs are included.
Final lock approval is not recorded from inferred answers.

evals.prompt: Jason answers several North Star interview questions and changes a product priority.
evals.expected_output: Preserves the answers as feedback or evidence, routes accepted changes back to northstar-planning review-feedback or artifact-loop, and keeps protected approval separate.
assertions: Human answers are not silently treated as final approval.
Accepted changes route back to the North Star planning loop.
Protected or high-impact changes remain proposed until approved.
The interview packet records disposition or next action.
